description:
Internet Download Manager (IDM) is a tool to increase download speeds by up to 5 times, resume and schedule downloads.


- Added the ability to download MP4 files from web sites where previously only TS videos were available. IDM displays both TS and MP4 file formats in its video download button. If you only need MP4 files, disable TS in IDM Options -> General tab -> Customize IDM Download panels in browsers -> Edit button. Remove TS extension on "Customize IDM Download panel in browsres" dialog
- Fixed video downloading problems on several popular web sites
- Fixed bugs
